title: Atrivis Sector Force
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{MilitaryUnit |image= |name=Atrivis Sector Force |type=[[Sector Force/Legends|Sector Force]] (Rebel Alliance) [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]] (New Republic) |formation= |commander= |second= |staff= |subunit= |strength= |vehicles= |headquarters= |location=[[Atrivis sector]] |battles= [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
[[Thrawn campaign]] *[[Fall of Generis]] |formed=[[Atrivis Resistance Group/Legends|Atrivis Resistance Group]] |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation= [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] *[[Sector Command (Alliance)/Legends|Sector Command]] [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} {{Quote|We lost the whole comm center, more or less intact, and most of the sector fleet supply depots.|[[Pash Cracken]], to [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|''[[The Last Command]]''}} The '''Atrivis Sector Force''' was the name given to the [[Atrivis Resistance Group/Legends|Atrivis Resistance Group]] after it joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The unit was placed under the command of the Alliance [[Sector Command (Alliance)/Legends|Sector Command]], as the renaming made the unit an officially recognized [[Sector Force/Legends|Sector Force]]. It was later reorganized as a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]]. Most of the fleet supply depots were located on [[Generis/Legends|Generis]]. They were [[Fall of Generis|lost]] during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. {{Reb-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}} *[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Alliance to Restore the Republic sector forces]] [[Category:New Republic fleets]]
